title: UHL Harena 2-Piece Dessert Plate Set, 19cm White Opal Glass Round Dessert Plates, Elegant Small Side Plates for Appetiser, Salad, Snacks, Fruits, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL - Made from high-quality white opal glass, this dessert plate is durable, chip-resistant, and designed for everyday use. The smooth, glossy finish offers a modern, elegant look while being stronger and more resilient than standard ceramic plates.

ELEGANT MINIMALIST DESIGN - The classic white plate with a ribbed rim complements any table setting or dinnerware collection. Its clean, modern style enhances food presentation and fits perfectly with contemporary, minimalist, or traditional kitchens.

PERFECT SIZE - With a 19cm diameter, this round plate is ideal for serving cakes, pastries, desserts, fruit, snacks, and appetisers. A versatile size suitable for home dining, afternoon tea, restaurants, cafes, and special occasions.

MICROWAVE & DISHWASHER SAFE - Designed for everyday convenience; reheat food effortlessly. The smooth, non-porous glass surface makes the plate easy to clean and dishwasher safe, ensuring hygienic food serving and effortless maintenance for busy households.
IDEAL FOR DAILY USE - This opal glass dessert plate is lightweight yet strong, resistant to stains and odours, and built to maintain its shine even with frequent washing and regular use.
description: This 2-piece dessert plate set is crafted from opal glass in a crisp white finish, featuring a round shape with a ribbed rim. Each 19cm plate is microwave and dishwasher safe�perfect for everyday desserts or entertaining guests.
